ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subspecies" (
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subspecies */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the subspecies */,
  "trinomial_authority" TEXT /* Scientific authority for the trinomial name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subspecies */,
  "range" TEXT /* Geographical range of the subspecies */,
  "binomial_name" TEXT /* Binomial name (genus and species) */,
  "subspecies_group" TEXT /* Subspecies group or category */,
  "conservation_priority" INTEGER /* Conservation priority level */,
  "genetic_diversity" REAL /* Measure of genetic diversity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the subspecies record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_title" TEXT /* Title of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption or description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the image */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the image is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "synonym_name" TEXT /* Synonymous name for the subspecies */,
  "synonym_type" TEXT /* Type of synonym (e.g., common, scientific) */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this is the preferred synonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, wildlife manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subspecies being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status record */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current conservation status (e.g., Endangered, Threatened) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the conservation status */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last conservation status assessment */,
  "next_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned assessment */,
  "assessed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the last assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat record */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., forest, wetlands) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat characteristics */,
  "habitat_size" REAL /* Size of the habitat in square kilometers */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the habitat */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last habitat survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitats_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader_user_id" INTEGER /* User who is leading the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threats" (
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat record */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "threat_description" TEXT /* Description of the threat (e.g., habitat destruction, climate change) */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the threat (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "mitigation_measures" TEXT /* Actions taken to mitigate the threat */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Last date the threat record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threats_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation record */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "date_observed" TEXT /* Date the observation was made */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., sighting, behavior) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the observation was made */,
  "observation_status" TEXT /* Status of the observation (e.g., confirmed, unconfirmed) */,
  "verified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who verified the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_verified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking tag */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "tag_number" TEXT /* Unique tag number assigned to the subspecies */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was attached */,
  "tag_status" TEXT /* Current status of the tag (e.g., active, lost) */,
  "last_signal_date" TEXT /* Last date the tag was detected */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., GPS, radio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., natural, urban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "subspecies_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated subspecies */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "published_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who published the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_subspecies_id FOREIGN KEY ("subspecies_id") REFERENCES subspecies ("subspecies_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_published_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("published_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, wildlife manager, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
